summary: Add GitHub management rules and normalized Markdown update records for app Update01-Update05.

operations.content:
# Hado Library GitHub operation rules

## Repository roles
- `main`: formal released source. Do not push directly.
- `feature/app-3.0.0.0`: current app development source of truth.
- `mytemark2/hado_library-preview`: browser verification only. Never edit it as a source.

## Start of work
Confirm repository, branch, latest commit SHA, difference from `main`, version metadata, and pushed state. Use Git commit SHA to identify the source. Do not require per-file SHA-256 at work start.

## Update records
Keep `docs/updates/<update>/roadmap.md`, `implementation.md`, and `report.md`. Update `docs/updates/README.md` in the same commit as code whenever practical. Keep legacy documents; link them from the new records.

## Preview
Pushes to `feature/app-3.0.0.0` trigger `.github/workflows/notify-preview.yml`. Preview sync is automatic. The preview repository must record the source branch and source commit SHA. Report development push and preview sync separately.

## HTML size control
Do not append large JavaScript blocks to HTML. Add a new external JS file for an independent responsibility or extend an existing JS file with the same responsibility. Keep HTML limited to DOM skeleton, minimal initialization, and `<script src="...">` declarations. Check load order, dependencies, `file://`, `https://`, and preview sync targets. If HTML approaches a size limit, externalize existing inline JavaScript before reducing features or relying only on compression.

## Delivery
Use SHA-256 for package integrity: standalone HTML vs ZIP-contained HTML, versioned HTML vs `index.html`, and derived JSON `sourceSha256`. Publish to `main` through Pull Request only.

# Hado Library app update records

Development branch: `feature/app-3.0.0.0`

| Update | Status | Summary | Roadmap | Implementation | Report |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Update01 | Completed | App 3.0.0.0 foundation and preview verification baseline | [roadmap](update01/roadmap.md) | [implementation](update01/implementation.md) | [report](update01/report.md) |
| Update02 | Completed | JSON import audit and derived data integration | [roadmap](update02/roadmap.md) | [implementation](update02/implementation.md) | [report](update02/report.md) |
| Update03 | Completed with revisions | Type navigation wizard and purpose selection improvements | [roadmap](update03/roadmap.md) | [implementation](update03/implementation.md) | [report](update03/report.md) |
| Update04 | Completed with revisions | Type candidate list and candidate filtering | [roadmap](update04/roadmap.md) | [implementation](update04/implementation.md) | [report](update04/report.md) |
| Update05 | Completed | Per-formation candidate tray and existing selector handoff | [roadmap](update05/roadmap.md) | [implementation](update05/implementation.md) | [report](update05/report.md) |

Legacy specifications and JSON reports remain under `docs/` and `report/`. New updates must use this directory structure.

# Update01 roadmap
## Purpose
Establish the app 3.0.0.0 development baseline and preview verification flow.
## Planned scope
- Preserve existing app behavior while preparing the 3.0 series.
- Record preview checks and GitHub operation rules.
- Keep `main` formal and use `feature/app-3.0.0.0` for development.
## Do not change
Existing save compatibility and major search behavior.
## Completion criteria
Preview checklist and initial specification are stored and the development branch remains runnable.

# Update01 implementation
## Implemented
- Added the app 3.0.0.0 baseline documents.
- Added preview checklist and initial specification.
- Began external JavaScript separation from HTML.
## Legacy references
- `docs/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE01_SPEC.md`
- `docs/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE01_PREVIEW_CHECKLIST.md`
## HTML size decision
New responsibilities should be external JS modules rather than additional large inline blocks.

# Update01 report
## Result
Completed as the app 3.0.0.0 development foundation.
## Verified
- Development branch established.
- Preview verification checklist stored.
- Existing behavior retained as the baseline.
## Remaining
Subsequent functional updates are tracked separately.

# Update02 roadmap
## Purpose
Import crawler-generated JSON safely and audit derived JSON consistency.
## Planned scope
- Integrate crawler JSON.
- Audit syntax, required files, derived indexes, and compatibility.
- Avoid app-side regeneration except safe fallback gates.
## Completion criteria
Imported JSON can be validated and the app loads the expected dataset.

# Update02 implementation
## Implemented
- Added JSON import tooling and audit output.
- Updated crawler-derived JSON and search-related indexes.
- Preserved app-side fallback as a safety mechanism only.
## Legacy references
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE02_REPORT.json`
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE02.2_JSON_IMPORT_AUDIT.json`
- `tools/import_crawler_json.ps1`

# Update02 report
## Result
Completed with JSON import audit.
## Verified
- JSON syntax and required-file checks were executed.
- Derived JSON integration was recorded.
## Remaining
Crawler JSON remains the source of truth. Future imports must continue derived JSON consistency checks.

# Update03 roadmap
## Purpose
Improve the type-search entry flow with a guided selection sequence.
## Planned scope
- Add wizard-style selection.
- Improve purpose selection and explanatory reasons.
- Preserve existing search and save behavior.
## Completion criteria
Users can progress through the intended selection order without breaking existing search functions.

# Update03 implementation
## Implemented
- Added type-entry external JavaScript modules.
- Iterated through Update03.1 to Update03.5 for wizard behavior and purpose explanations.
- Kept the feature separated from the large app HTML.
## Legacy references
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE03_REPORT.json`
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE03.1_REPORT.json`
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE03.2_REPORT.json`
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE03.3_REPORT.json`
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE03.4_REPORT.json`
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE03.5_REPORT.json`

# Update03 report
## Result
Completed with revisions.
## Verified
- Wizard entry flow added.
- Purpose selection and reason display improved.
- Existing app HTML was not expanded with a large inline implementation.
## Remaining
Candidate display and placement handoff were deferred to later updates.

# Update04 roadmap
## Purpose
Provide type candidates while excluding unusable zero-match candidates.
## Planned scope
- Add candidate list display.
- Preserve existing formation gates.
- Exclude candidates with no relevant match.
## Completion criteria
Candidate list is available without bypassing formation validity checks.

# Update04 implementation
## Implemented
- Added external candidate-list modules.
- Added zero-match candidate exclusion and vaccine-type compatibility handling.
- Kept placement separate from candidate browsing.
## Legacy references
- `docs/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE04.2_SCOPE.md`
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE04.1_REPORT.json`
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE04.2_REPORT.json`

# Update04 report
## Result
Completed with revisions through Update04.2.
## Verified
- Candidate list display added.
- Zero-match candidates excluded.
- Existing formation gates were not bypassed.
## Remaining
Per-formation candidate tray and selector handoff were deferred to Update05.

# Update05 roadmap
## Purpose
Add a per-formation candidate tray and hand placement decisions to existing formation selectors.
## Planned scope
- Persist `evaluationTypeId` and `candidateTray`.
- Connect main general, vice general, support general, attendant, and equipment.
- Do not directly place items or bypass existing gates.
## Deferred
Formation, siege weapon, warhorse, and warhorse skill connections.
## Completion criteria
Candidates can be stored per formation and handed to existing selector dialogs safely.

# Update05 implementation
## Implemented
- Added the candidate tray external JavaScript responsibility.
- Persisted `evaluationTypeId` and `candidateTray`.
- Connected main general, vice general, support general, attendant, and equipment.
- Delegated placement to existing selector dialogs instead of calling direct assignment.
## HTML size decision
The new behavior is externalized. HTML contains only loading declarations and minimal integration.
## Legacy references
- `docs/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE05_SCOPE.md`
- `report/HADO_APP_3.0.0.0_UPDATE05_REPORT.json`
- `updates/applied/app-update05-candidate-tray-final.json`

# Update05 report
## Result
Completed.
## Verified
- Candidate tray persistence: completed.
- Evaluation type persistence: completed.
- Existing selector handoff: completed.
- Direct placement bypass: not used.
## Connected roles
Main general, vice general, support general, attendant, equipment.
## Deferred roles
Formation, siege weapon, warhorse, warhorse skill.
## Preview
Pushes to `feature/app-3.0.0.0` are automatically dispatched to the preview repository. Confirm source SHA from preview history after each functional update.
